steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/theme.php'; require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/plugin.php'; WP_Filesystem(); foreach ( array( 'twentytwentyfive', 'twentytwentyfour', 'twentytwentythree' ) as $theme ) { delete_theme( $theme ); } $plugins = array( 'akismet/akismet.php', 'hello.php' ); deactivate_plugins( $plugins, true ); delete_plugins( $plugins ); ?>

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $all = get_posts( array( 'post_type' => array( 'post', 'page' ), 'post_status' => 'any', 'numberposts' => -1, 'fields' => 'ids' ) ); foreach ( $all as $id ) { wp_delete_post( $id, true ); } ?>
